name: english-self-study-pipeline
description: OFFLINE dev-only content pipeline for the YouStudy - English self-study site. Turns the read-only content/ library (messy AJ Hoge / EnglishPod / 6 Minute English PDFs + filenames) into validated lesson JSON + the lean catalogue. NONE of this is served (buildless deploy-from-branch); the app ships only static files (see specs/03-architecture.md §5).

scripts.build: node scripts/extract.mjs && node scripts/compile-grammar.mjs && node scripts/build-index.mjs && node scripts/stage-media.mjs && node scripts/manifest.mjs && node scripts/validate.mjs
